19.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
19.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

19.gl: a sea (as breaking in noisy surf) or large body of water; specifically (with the article), the Mediterranean Sea; sometimes a large river, or an artifical basin; locally, the west, or (rarely) the south
19.dv: from an unused root meaning to roar;

19.gl: properly, extension, i.e. height or breadth; also a measure (including its standard); hence a portion (as measured) or a vestment; specifically, tribute (as measured)
19.kj: garment, measure(-ing, meteyard, piece, size, (great) stature, tribute, wide.

19.gl: a reed (as erect); by resemblance a rod (especially for measuring), shaft, tube, stem, the radius (of the arm), beam (of a steelyard)
19.kj: balance, bone, branch, calamus, cane, reed, [idiom] spearman, stalk.

19.gl: properly, to stretch; by implication, to measure (as if by stretching a line); figuratively, to be extended

20.gl: wind; by resemblance breath, i.e. a sensible (or even violent) exhalation; figuratively, life, anger, unsubstantiality; by extension, a region of the sky; by resemblance spirit, but only of a rational being (including it
20.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

20.gl: between (repeated before each noun, often with other particles); also as a conjunction, either...or
20.kj: among, asunder, at, between (-twixt...and), [phrase] from (the widest), [idiom] in, out of, whether (it be...or), within.
20.dv: (sometimes in the plural masculine or feminine); properly, the constructive form of an otherwise unused noun from H995 (בִּין); a distinction; but use

20.gl: to divide (in variation senses literally or figuratively, separate, distinguish, differ, select, etc.)
20.kj: (make, put) difference, divide (asunder), (make) separate (self, -ation), sever (out), [idiom] utterly.

20.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
20.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

20.gl: (as noun) a circle, neighbour, or environs; but chiefly (as adverb, with or without preposition) around
20.kj: (place, round) about, circuit, compass, on every side.

20.gl: properly, to stretch; by implication, to measure (as if by stretching a line); figuratively, to be extended
